title: Add All India Services messaging and Specialty Items section with pink-accented images

requirements.text: Add prominent 'All India Services' messaging to the homepage to communicate nationwide service availability, integrated naturally with existing content sections

quotes: Add "All India Services" messaging prominently on the site

acceptanceCriteria: All India Services messaging is prominently displayed on the homepage
The messaging clearly communicates nationwide service availability
The styling is consistent with the existing coffee and cardboard color scheme
The messaging integrates naturally with existing sections without disrupting layout

requirements.text: Create a new 'Specialty Items We Handle' section on the homepage that showcases the company's capability to pack and move delicate items such as photo frames, trophies, and antique items

quotes: Add some pink in handle photo frame trophy and antic item
Create a dedicated "Specialty Items We Handle" section

acceptanceCriteria: A new section titled 'Specialty Items We Handle' or similar is added to the homepage
The section displays generated images of photo frames, trophies, and antique items with pink accents
The section layout is responsive and follows the existing design patterns
The section communicates the company's expertise in handling delicate and valuable items

requirements.text: Render all newly generated specialty item images as static assets in the frontend/public/assets/generated directory for use in the Specialty Items section
acceptanceCriteria: All generated specialty item images are placed in frontend/public/assets/generated directory
Images are properly referenced in the Specialty Items section component
Images load correctly and display with appropriate sizing and styling

constraints: Maintain the existing coffee and cardboard color scheme throughout new sections
Ensure new sections follow the existing modern design patterns with proper spacing and animations
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Backend functionality or data persistence for specialty items
Interactive features for specialty items (booking, pricing, quotes)
Multiple pages or routing beyond the single homepage

required: Photo frame with ornate pink-accented handle or border, elegant style suitable for packing service showcase (photo-frame-pink.dim_400x400.png)
Trophy with pink accents on base or handles, polished metallic finish (trophy-pink.dim_400x400.png)
Antique decorative item (vase or clock) with pink handle or detailing, vintage aesthetic (antique-item-pink.dim_400x400.png)
